name: Filing Ozone Asthma Claims in Boise Workers' Comp

mainEntity.name: How to file Idaho workers' comp for ozone-aggravated asthma from Boise traffic fumes?
mainEntity.text: How to file Idaho workers' comp for ozone-aggravated asthma from Boise traffic fumes?

acceptedAnswer.text: File Industrial Commission Form 1 within 1 year; submit PFTs, exposure diary, specialist report proving >50% aggravation from job site ozone.

suggestedAnswer.text: Boise commuters claim if dashcam/ logs show excessive idling. Idaho caps TTD 104 weeks. High denial rate (25%); appeal to referee. Link to ALA ozone rankings strengthens.

description: File Industrial Commission Form 1 within 1 year; submit PFTs, exposure diary, specialist report proving >50% aggravation from job site ozone.
